radius-xs.$description: Smallest corner radius — tiny inset elements (checkbox box, kbd key, table/sidebar hover buttons, legend swatch, inline code, audit-log diff chips, small tags). The bottom rung below radius-sm.

sidebar-w-rail.$description: Collapsed icon-rail width for the app-shell sidebar (data-nav=rail / data-collapsed). Contractual so the rail width stops being hand-coded as 56px in app-shell.css and products can retheme it. Full = --uix-sidebar-w, rail = this, hidden = 0.

col-w-xs.$description: Table column-width scale — the shared tier set consumers attach to a column via .uix-col--w-* (on <col>/<th>/<td>) instead of hand-coding per-app pixel widths. Reconciles the widths house products use for compact data columns: xs≈priority/flag, sm≈type/date, md≈id/status/team, lg≈assignee/person, xl≈long labels. Snap each column to the nearest tier.

col-title-min.$description: Min-width floor for the primary/flex column (.uix-col--flex) — the subject/title never collapses below this; the table scrolls horizontally (pinned first column intact) instead of squeezing the title. Generalises the old 280px title cap.
